marketName: Fluid Power Cylinder and Actuator Manufacturing
coreJobStatement: Enable controlled linear force and displacement in machines and infrastructure by converting pressurized fluid energy into repeatable, measurable stroke and load [SRC: VN_hydraulic_cylinders]
productJobStatement: Help L6a Input Material & Blank Supply to supply piston rod blanks at OD tolerance, straightness, alloy grade, and carbon content required for subsequent grinding, chrome plating, and induction hardening into pressure-rated cylinder rods
anchorLevel: L5 (standalone product — precision steel bar / rod blank)
lPath: L7 Fluid Power Motion & Control Ecosystem > L6a Input Material & Blank Supply > L5 Precision Steel Bar / Rod Blank

segments.name: Construction equipment OEMs
segments.characteristics: High force, custom stroke, outdoor exposure, high volume
segments.targetabilityReason: Design tolerance, volume commitment, and certification requirements differ
segments.circumstance: High force, custom stroke, outdoor exposure, high volume
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — design tolerance and volume commitment differ from industrial

segments.name: Agricultural machinery OEMs
segments.targetabilityReason: Cost sensitivity drives different rod blank specifications
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — cost sensitivity drives different rod blank specifications

segments.name: Industrial machinery OEMs
segments.characteristics: Precision, clean environments, high duty cycle, low-mid pressure
segments.circumstance: Precision, clean environments, high duty cycle, low-mid pressure
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — precision requirements and duty cycle constraints differ

segments.name: Mobile / off-highway OEMs
segments.characteristics: Extreme conditions, high pressure (>=350 bar), vibration, contamination
segments.targetabilityReason: Extreme performance envelope alters rod blank requirements
segments.circumstance: Extreme conditions, high pressure (>=350 bar), vibration, contamination
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — extreme performance envelope alters rod blank requirements

alternatives.name: Cold-drawn precision round bar (C45 / 42CrMo4)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Min batch ~100 kg; 6-12 week tooling lead for new OD; max OD ~56 mm for cold-draw (2,500 mm2); no custom cross-section

alternatives.name: Precision-turned + OD-ground bar from hot-rolled stock
alternatives.tradeoffs: 20-30% more material waste; additional turning operation; hot-rolled tolerance +-0.5 mm requires heavier grinding stock

alternatives.name: Forged rod blank (large-diameter, heavy-duty)
alternatives.tradeoffs: High tooling cost; min batch ~500 kg; 8-16 week lead time; not suited for OD < ~80 mm

alternatives.name: Commercially available pre-ground piston rod stock
alternatives.tradeoffs: Limited to standard ODs (25-100 mm in 5 mm steps); standard alloy grades only; no custom geometry or induction hardening

alternatives.name: Do nothing / outsource to contract rod bar processor
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero in-house metallurgical control; extended supply chain; quality traceability risk; zero P1 burden on internal engineering team

jobSteps.description: Define piston rod blank OD, length, alloy grade, carbon content, and tolerance requirements
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Blank specification is the gating input to ZOLLERN's die selection and alloy routing
jobSteps.rawStatement: Define piston rod blank OD, length, alloy grade, carbon content, and tolerance requirements
jobSteps.rationale: Blank specification is the gating input to ZOLLERN's die selection and alloy routing

jobSteps.description: Identify and qualify rod blank suppliers meeting spec and delivery requirements
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Supplier qualification is directly where ZOLLERN competes
jobSteps.rawStatement: Identify and qualify rod blank suppliers meeting spec and delivery requirements
jobSteps.rationale: Supplier qualification is directly where ZOLLERN competes

jobSteps.description: Issue drawing, request quote, submit trial order, and initiate first-article qualification
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: ZOLLERN's tooling lead time and FAI process are active friction points
jobSteps.rawStatement: Issue drawing, request quote, submit trial order, and initiate first-article qualification
jobSteps.rationale: ZOLLERN's tooling lead time and FAI process are active friction points

jobSteps.description: Verify incoming material — certs, dimensional, hardness — against spec
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: EN 10204 3.1, OD tolerance, and hardness are ZOLLERN's primary conformance outputs
jobSteps.rawStatement: Verify incoming material — certs, dimensional, hardness — against spec
jobSteps.rationale: EN 10204 3.1, OD tolerance, and hardness are ZOLLERN's primary conformance outputs

jobSteps.description: Process blank through rod manufacturing cell — grinding, surface treatment, IH
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Blank OD tolerance and surface quality directly constrain grinding and chrome plating outcomes
jobSteps.rawStatement: Process blank through rod manufacturing cell — grinding, surface treatment, IH
jobSteps.rationale: Blank OD tolerance and surface quality directly constrain grinding and chrome plating outcomes

jobSteps.description: Monitor rod geometry, surface quality, and hardness in-process across batches
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Lot-to-lot blank consistency determines monitoring burden
jobSteps.rawStatement: Monitor rod geometry, surface quality, and hardness in-process
jobSteps.rationale: Lot-to-lot blank consistency determines monitoring burden
